case_title: RAUL ARRIAZA et al VS. EMMETT WILKINSON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF RAUL ARRIAZA FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARRIAZA, RAUL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ARRIAZA, RAUL TISKER, PABLO D. AS TO DEFENDANT WILKINSON, EMMETT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED FEB-14-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILKINSON, EMMETT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANT RAUL ARRIAZA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARRIAZA, RAUL TISKER, PABLO D. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILKINSON, EMMETT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
